subjects.description: An oncoming vehicle in the opposite lane, identifiable mainly by its intensely bright high-beam headlights piercing through the darkness; the body of the car is obscured behind the glare, only faint hints of a dark sedan silhouette visible around the light source
subjects.appearance_details: Two blinding white-blue circular headlight pools with prominent lens-flare star artifacts, halation, and bloom, their glare smeared into wet-road reflections; faint amber side marker glow
subjects.relationship: The source of glare impairing the ego vehicle's visibility; travels directly opposite the ego on the shared downtown street
subjects.location: center to slightly left of frame, approaching from background to midground
subjects.relative_size: Small within frame growing to Medium within frame as it nears
subjects.orientation: Front-facing toward the camera, headlights aimed directly at the ego viewpoint
subjects.action: Approaching on the opposite lane with high beams on, then passing by
subjects.state_changes: Grows brighter and larger as it nears the intersection hump, peaks in glare at closest approach, then sweeps past to the left and recedes, glare clearing amid neon reflections

subjects.description: The ego vehicle itself, represented only by its interior dashboard edge and the forward illumination of its own headlights spilling onto the road ahead
subjects.appearance_details: Faint dashboard reflection along the bottom edge of the frame, twin cones of headlight light spreading over the asphalt and lane markings
subjects.relationship: The point-of-view vehicle through which the entire scene is observed
subjects.location: implied at camera position, dashboard at bottom foreground
subjects.orientation: Facing forward down the road in the driving direction
subjects.action: Driving level down the wet street, cresting the intersection hump, then continuing while slowing and resuming speed
subjects.state_changes: Decelerates significantly during peak glare, then accelerates back to nominal cruising speed

background_setting: A dense downtown grid at night in light rain, tall buildings crowding both sides of a flat multi-lane street with no median. Wet worn asphalt throws back smeared neon reds and greens and the cool pools of overhead streetlights; painted lane lines glisten. Autumn debris and a few soaked leaves cling to the gutters. The street runs level then rises over a low hump at a cross-intersection ahead, a subtle crest that briefly hides then reveals the far lane. Beyond the lit blocks the wet city recedes into rain-hazed dark.

lighting.conditions: Rainy urban night lit by streetlights, storefront neon, and traffic signals; slick roadway
lighting.direction: Ego headlights front-lit; intense oncoming high-beam glare straight ahead and slightly left, mixing with reflected neon
lighting.shadows: Soft doubled shadows from mixed street lamps and signage, smeared across the wet asphalt
lighting.illumination_effect: Wet-road specular streaks stretch every light source into long vertical smears; oncoming high beams add overwhelming bloom, rain-scattered starburst flares, and washout

aesthetics.composition: Centered street vanishing between building walls, the low intersection hump near mid-frame, oncoming glare blooming upper-center, dashboard edge at bottom
aesthetics.color_scheme: Rain-black asphalt and deep navy sky cut by neon reds/greens and harsh white-blue headlight glare with warm sodium accents
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Tense, disorienting, slick and momentarily blinding, cautious
aesthetics.patterns: Reflected neon smears and dashed lane markings sliding past on wet asphalt

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward dashcam tracking through wet downtown, faint rain jitter, subtle rise over the intersection hump, deceleration drift then re-acceleration
cinematography.framing: Wide shot of the road ahead from driver viewpoint
cinematography.focus: Road and wet lane markings ahead, though glare and rain smear overwhelm focus at peak brightness

context: Demonstration of nighttime oncoming-headlight glare and driver visibility management on a rain-slick downtown street

actions.description: Ego vehicle drives level down the wet downtown street at nominal speed, distant oncoming headlights appear faint past the low intersection hump
Vehicle rises over the intersection hump; oncoming high beams rapidly intensify, flooding the rain-smeared view with glare and lens artifacts
Ego vehicle slows significantly to manage impaired visibility as the oncoming car passes on the left throwing up spray
Glare clears, the wet street becomes visible again, ego vehicle resumes nominal speed

segments.description: Driving level down the rain-slick downtown street with faint oncoming light growing past the intersection hump
segments.key_changes: Distant headlights begin to appear amid reflected neon
segments.camera: Forward tracking with slight upward pitch on the climb

segments.description: Rising over the intersection hump as oncoming high beams flare into severe glare
segments.key_changes: Rapid increase in brightness, bloom and rain-scattered starburst artifacts wash across the wet frame
segments.camera: Subtle bob over the crest, then leveling into descent

segments.description: Ego vehicle slows for the passing car throwing spray, then glare clears and nominal speed resumes
segments.key_changes: Deceleration, oncoming vehicle sweeps past left, artifacts fade, wet road regains visibility, re-acceleration
segments.camera: Slight forward dip during braking, then smooth resumed forward tracking

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the dashcam looks down a rain-slick downtown street, ego headlights and reflected neon smeared over wet lane markings while a faint glow grows past the low intersection hump. By 0:01 the vehicle rises over the hump and a pair of oncoming high beams rapidly brightens. Through 0:02-0:03 the view is overwhelmed by white-blue glare, rain-scattered lens flares, and bloom that wash across the wet street. Around 0:03 the ego slows noticeably to cope with impaired visibility as the oncoming car sweeps past on the left throwing up spray. From 0:04 to 0:05 the glare clears, the wet road ahead reappears, and the ego accelerates back to nominal cruising speed.
audio_description: Steady hum of the engine and wet tire hiss on slick asphalt, rising then dipping as the vehicle decelerates. Light rain patter on the roof, a close whoosh and spray as the oncoming car passes, distant city traffic and a muffled signal chirp; no music or speech.
